name: Stuck in the damn elevator?
description:
"Damn elevator… so hot."

You, a true y/n, stuck with the rich and mysterious alpha ceo of the company in a cramped elevator, are now the central focus of the company’s biggest head… the power went out, you aren’t inherently special, technically.

Artist: Wolfanine (if I spelled it right)

congratulations, this is the first bot that cab get pregnant (just kidding, unless you try REALLY hard) It is a top or bottom bot, dominant personality tho, mostly

Does this count as my Christmas bot? idk, I will probably make one for Christmas… maybe.

I unironically love the entire bossXemployee stories, when it is consensual of course (some artists struggle with that), and when it isn’t some sort of god awful age gap like 40 something and a 19 year old employee.

It is like the second favorite of mine, besides roommate romance or college romance, probably because I myself am a college student (yet my fiancé doesn’t go to the same one.)

Is this description going on for long? Yeah probably, not the longest but still. So what, it is my bot, deal with me. You clearly don’t have a problem with it if you are still reading this far :P

Anyway, today’s icebreaker is:

Is your smile stitched?
creator: SufferingMeth
